title: WordPress REST Post Statuses Flow

steps: NO  → return true (view context always permitted)
Build $data array: name, private, protected, public, queryable, show_in_list, slug, date_floating (only included fields)
Add HAL link 'archives' → rest_url for post type items (with ?status=X if not 'publish')

key_methods: get_items_permissions_check($request): true|WP_Error — allows 'view' context freely; 'edit' context requires edit_posts cap on any REST-enabled post type
get_item_permissions_check($request): true|WP_Error — validates status exists + check_read_permission
check_read_permission($status): bool — public=true → allow; non-internal or 'trash' → require edit_posts cap; else deny
get_items($request): WP_REST_Response — iterates all non-internal statuses + trash, filters by check_read_permission, prepares each
get_item($request): WP_REST_Response|WP_Error — fetches single status by slug, prepares response
prepare_item_for_response($item, $request): WP_REST_Response — selects fields, applies context filter, adds archive HAL link, fires rest_prepare_status filter
get_item_schema(): array — JSON Schema with fields: name, private, protected, public, queryable, show_in_list, slug, date_floating
key_conditions: context='edit' triggers elevated permission checks (edit_posts capability)
status->internal=false OR name='trash' → readable only if current user can edit_posts on any REST post type
status->internal=true (and not trash) → never readable via API
Schema fields are context-gated: private/protected/show_in_list only in 'edit' context
external_wp_functions: get_post_stati(array, 'object') — fetch all registered post statuses
get_post_status_object(slug) — fetch single post status object
get_post_types(array, 'objects') — fetch post types with show_in_rest=true
add_query_arg('status', name, url) — append status filter to archive URL
important_notes: Controller is registered at wp/v2/statuses. 'trash' is explicitly included even though internal. Permission logic for both list and single-item is unified through check_read_permission(). HAL 'archives' link points to /wp/v2/posts (or /wp/v2/posts?status=X for non-publish). Schema is cached in $this->schema. The rest_prepare_status filter allows plugins to modify responses.
